---
title: "Week 04"
---

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Monday (03/02)
:::

**Topics**

-   Fisher Information

**Daily assignment**

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_09.pdf) (very short!)

**Class activity**

-   TBD

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Wednesday (03/04)
:::

**Topics**

-   MLE asymptotics

-   Cramer-Rao Lower Bound

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   TBD

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Friday (03/06)
:::

**Topics**

-   Efficiency

**Daily assignment**

-   TBD

**Class activity**

-   TBD
